completed: Phase 0: repo audit + full read of spec.md; produced analysis, phase plan, risk summary
Phase 0: confirmed the repository already contains scaffolded backend/frontend/docker assets beyond the initial skeleton
Phase 1: git init; spec.md moved to repo root
Phase 1: created folder layout (backend/, frontend/, nginx/, scripts/)
Phase 1: .gitignore, .env.example, README skeleton
Phase 1: backend Dockerfile + requirements.txt + start_backend.sh entrypoint
Phase 1: frontend Dockerfile (Next.js standalone)
Phase 1: docker-compose.yml (postgres/pgvector, backend, frontend, nginx)
Phase 1: nginx reverse-proxy config
Phase 1: run scripts (dev.sh, down.sh) + gen_password_hash.py helper
Phase 2: config.py (pydantic-settings), db/session.py (async engine), db/base.py declarative Base
Phase 2: core/security.py (bcrypt verify + JWT + require_admin dependency)
Phase 2: schemas (common Envelope, auth, chatbot)
Phase 2: AIProvider abstract base + DeepSeekProvider (embed/chat/chat_stream via httpx) + factory/DI
Phase 2: API routers - public (profile/skills/experiences/projects/education/courses/certificates/social-links), admin (login/me/reindex/knowledge-status), chatbot (query)
Phase 2: main.py wires CORS, routers, /health, error envelope
Phase 2: Alembic scaffolding (alembic.ini, env.py loads settings + async engine, script.py.mako)
Phase 2: validated app boots; TestClient confirms all endpoints incl. full admin login->JWT->protected-route round-trip
Phase 3: implemented relational schema models and translation tables per spec
Phase 3: added knowledge chunk, AI knowledge, and single admin user models
Phase 3: created Alembic initial migration for schema and pgvector extension
Phase 3: validated model metadata registration with pytest
Package 1: backend service modules for content, RAG, and reindex pipeline created
Package 1: chatbot endpoint wired to full RAG decision flow (scope filter -> similarity gate -> retrieval -> rerank -> context -> generation -> citation formatting -> fallbacks)

Package 1: replaced keyword-based context_relevance_filter with LLM-based classify_scope() and a real cosine-similarity relevance gate (passes_similarity_gate()) per spec threshold rag_similarity_threshold
Package 1: added owner-name-aware system prompt and spec-locked fallback copy for 'unrelated' and 'no_answer' statuses; unexpected errors degrade to 'error' status instead of a 500
Package 1: added backend/tests/test_chatbot_rag.py covering scope classification (yes/no/provider-error fail-open) and the similarity gate math

Package 1: added missing admin list endpoints (GET) for experiences, education, courses, certificates, projects, social-links, ai-knowledge in admin_service.py and admin.py, following the existing list_skills convention
Package 1: added backend/tests/test_admin_list_endpoints.py verifying route wiring and admin auth enforcement
Package 2: fixed Course model vs Alembic migration schema mismatch
Package 2: implemented Query Planner + Query Rewrite stage (plan_query()) with LLM-based query rewrite, complexity assessment, and ambiguity detection
Package 2: wired plan_query into build_question_answer() between the scope filter and embedding/retrieval steps
Package 2: added 4 unit tests for plan_query to test_chatbot_rag.py

Package 3: added PostgreSQL Full Text Search (BM25) — migration 0002_add_bm25_search_vector adds search_vector_en/search_vector_fa tsvector columns with GIN indexes and an auto-population trigger; KnowledgeChunk model updated; reindex.py uses ORM with trigger-based tsvector population
Package 3: implemented hybrid retrieval (hybrid_retrieve() runs pgvector + BM25 searches in parallel via asyncio.gather, with English-fallback per method, then RRF-fuses results)
Package 3: implemented Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) via _rrf_fuse() with RRF_K=60 dampening constant; adds RRF score and per-method rank tracking to RetrievalSource dataclass
Package 3: updated passes_similarity_gate() to handle both RRF-scored results (dynamic threshold based on method count) and legacy pgvector cosine-distance results (1 - distance conversion)

Package 3: implemented high-confidence early-exit stop condition — when top result has RRF ≥ HIGH_CONFIDENCE_RRF (0.03) and both methods agree at rank ≤ STOP_BOTH_RANK (2), reranking is skipped to save LLM calls
Package 3: implemented dynamic retrieval budget — plan_query returns complexity ('low'/'medium'/'high') which scales effective_top_k via BUDGET_MULTIPLIER (0.6/1.0/1.4)
Package 3: implemented clarification flow — plan_query returns needs_clarification flag; build_question_answer returns 'needs_clarification' status with a polite clarification prompt when True

Package 3: implemented strict citation validation via validate_answer_citations() — LLM-based check that verifies the answer is grounded in retrieved sources; failed validation triggers a strict regeneration with explicit context-only instruction

Package 3: added backend/tests/test_hybrid_retrieval.py (11 tests for RRF formula, fusion, deduplication, similarity gate with RRF scores) and expanded test_chatbot_rag.py (7 new tests for plan_query complexity/clarification, budget constants, citation validation)

known_blockers: No live Postgres+pgvector or DeepSeek API credentials available in this environment. All new RAG features (hybrid retrieval, RRF, BM25, stop conditions, clarification, citation validation) validated via 42 unit tests covering pure logic functions and route wiring; not yet exercised against a real Postgres + pgvector instance. Migration 0002_add_bm25_search_vector adds tsvector columns and a trigger but has not been applied via alembic upgrade head against a live DB.
next_implementation_task: Agentic RAG pipeline is complete. Remaining backend work: add tests for admin auth service logic and create/update/delete operations. Frontend implementation is blocked until backend is fully complete. No further RAG features remain.
